LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.'S AND KIMON DAIFOTIS' MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO MAY 8, 2014 PER ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE, TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE ROBERTSON WHO WILL BE SITTING IN THE LAW AND MOTION DEPARTMENT. LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PETITIONERS CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC. AND KIMON DAIFOTIS' MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar May-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ian Ross, Esq. of Keesal Young & Logan, Tel. 415.398.6000, for petitioners and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONERs CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC. and KIMON DAIFOTIS' Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGMENT SIGNED. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Apr-25-2014 Continued To May-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling on PETITIONERS CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.'S and KIMON DAIFOTIS' Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award. Judge Miller recuses herself from this case. Per order of the presiding judge, the motion is continued to May 8, 2014, to be heard by Judge Robertson who will be sitting in the law and motion department. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
